pl_core_layers_to_build_now: conv1: 3x3 conv + bias + requant + fused ReLU
output_clip: MINIMUM + RELU can be merged as one output clamp block
layers_not_needed_as_standalone_blocks: No separate ReLU block after conv1 because it is fused into conv1.
Input QUANTIZE and final QUANTIZE are format conversion blocks, not convolution layers.

hardware_blocks.name: input_quantize
hardware_blocks.hardware_action: uint8 input to int8 input conversion
hardware_blocks.note: This is input formatting, not a convolution layer.

hardware_blocks.name: conv1
hardware_blocks.note: Conv1 output already includes fused ReLU in TFLite runtime.

hardware_blocks.name: conv3
hardware_blocks.note: This layer is plain convolution. No fused ReLU after conv3.

hardware_blocks.name: pixel_shuffle
hardware_blocks.note: Data rearrangement only. No multiplier and no MAC.

hardware_blocks.name: output_clip
hardware_blocks.hardware_action: clip output to valid int8 range before final output quantize
hardware_blocks.note: MINIMUM with constant 127 then RELU. This is equivalent to clipped ReLU style output limiting.

hardware_blocks.name: output_quantize
hardware_blocks.hardware_action: int8 output to final uint8 output format conversion
hardware_blocks.note: This is final output formatting, not a MAC layer.
